duplicateWarning: Detected {} game(s) with duplicate TIDs, highlighted in red. Do not create games with the same TID in different directories, as this may cause data management conflicts. Please manually merge the related game folders on the SD card.

manualRenameDesc: Manually enter a custom display name
onlineFetchDesc:
Match localized game name from cloud
 - Currently supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English only
restoreNameDesc: Delete custom name and restore to the official original name
addGameDesc: Select from installed games list, or manually enter a TID to add
removeGameDesc:
Remove current game from the list. MODs will be moved to transit
 - Ensure all MODs of the selected game are uninstalled
viewPathDesc: View the current game's location on the SD card
clearTransitDesc: Permanently delete MOD files in transit. This cannot be undone, proceed with caution
themeColorDesc: Set the app UI theme color. Takes effect after restart
fpsMonitorDesc: Show current frame rate in the top status bar
memMonitorDesc: Show heap memory usage in the top status bar
languageDesc: Set the app UI display language. Takes effect after restart
langRestartMsg: Language will take effect after restart. Restart now?
themeRestartMsg: Theme will take effect after restart. Restart now?
storeGameListDesc: Browse games with available mods in the store
storeModListDesc: View store mods for the currently selected game
uploadModDesc:
- Scan QR code to visit the web store
 - Web only provides browsing and mod uploading
 - Uploading pornographic, political, sensitive or illegal content is prohibited and will result in permanent ban
 - URL: https://tom-switch.fun
nicknameDesc: Username displayed when commenting on mod detail pages in the store
favoriteDesc: Add/remove current game from favorites. Favorites appear at the top of the list

firstLaunchNotice:
Thank you for using NX-Mod-Manager.
Before getting started, please read the following carefully.

This new release, while an iteration of version 2.x, has undergone a complete code rewrite and underlying architecture redesign to fundamentally resolve the issues present in 2.x. Due to the significant architectural changes, data from the previous version is not compatible for migration, such as mod installation states, custom names, and descriptions. Therefore, this version can be regarded as an entirely new and independent mod manager. Users upgrading from 2.x will need to manually reconfigure their settings.

Additionally, because the mod system on the Switch platform differs fundamentally from PC, mods cannot run in complete isolation from one another, making overall management more complex. No mod manager currently available can fully prevent interference caused by mod operations performed outside of it. For example, manually installing or uninstalling mods on the SD card, or using a third-party mod manager while this one is in use, will invalidate the data recorded internally by this manager. While this does not affect basic functionality, it may result in residual files when uninstalling affected mods, making complete cleanup impossible.

Therefore, it is recommended that before using this mod manager, users fully uninstall any mods installed manually, via the 2.x version manager, or via third-party mod managers, to ensure a clean and consistent environment and avoid potential compatibility issues.

Please confirm that you have read and understood the above before holding the button to continue.
